reviews.review_description: The graphics and the game concept is good and has potential. BUT you really can't aim! The arrows released from the bow automatically and fly wherever they want. I've played a lot of arrow games, and for me good aiming is crucial for that kind of games

I get that this is early access - but there are things that just don’t work. The fact the arrow releases automatically is, for me, counter intuitive. It’s very difficult to load and use the special arrows due to graphic glitches. Same goes for aiming - screen jumps around too much. It has potential - that’s for use - but lot of work required.

This is hands down one of the most fun fantasy archer games I’ve tried in VR! 🎯🏹 The world design pulls you right in, the shooting mechanics are super smooth and satisfying, and the graphics are amazing compared to most other games out there. 🌟 Plus, there’s something so cool about nailing that perfect shot from across the map! If you’re into archery and a Lord of the Rings-style atmosphere, this game is 100% worth it! 💪

reviews.review_title: “ MOST BOW-T-FUL TOWER DEFENSE GAME YET

reviews.review_title: one of the better fantasy games on VR
reviews.review_description: In my opinion, this is one of the better fantasy games on VR, I like the system of special arrows, the archery itself is fun and satisfying, the game is not too difficult or too easy. For this price, I recommend it to everyone
